evals.prompt:
Audit this HTML for WCAG 2.2 AA compliance: ```html
Home Products Contact

Welcome

```
evals.expected_output: Audit report identifying specific WCAG violations
assertions: Identifies missing alt text on hero image (1.1.1)
Reports insufficient color contrast on button (1.4.3)
Includes before/after code examples for fixes

evals.prompt:
Check this modal dialog for ARIA accessibility: ```html

Confirm Delete

Are you sure you want to delete this item?

```
assertions: Provides corrected HTML with ARIA attributes

evals.prompt:
Audit this navigation for keyboard accessibility: ```html
Menu
Profile Settings Logout
```
assertions: Recommends arrow key navigation for items
Notes Escape key to close dropdown

evals.expected_output: Contrast ratio analysis with WCAG compliance status
assertions: Calculates contrast ratios for each color pair
Compares against WCAG AA (4.5:1) and AAA (7:1) thresholds
Identifies .text-muted fails AA for small text (1.4.3)
Suggests darker color for .text-muted to meet AA
Provides specific color codes that pass

evals.prompt:
Audit this form for screen reader compatibility: ```html
Username
Subscribe to newsletter
```
assertions: Identifies span instead of label for username (1.3.1, 3.3.2)
Recommends aria-label for select (or visible label)
Provides corrected HTML with proper labeling
